name: Lost Unity
implicitMods: Adds 7 to 15 Fire Damage to Spells and Attacks
explicitMods: Grants Level 30 Herald of the Hive Skill
flavourText: All gates are closed.
All dreams are silenced.
What could have been...

typeLine: Alchemist's Quicksilver Flask of the Cheetah
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

name: Foulborn Headhunter
explicitMods: When you Kill a Rare monster, you gain its Modifiers for 60 seconds
mutatedMods: Rare and Unique Enemies within 120 metres have Minimap Icons
flavourText: "A man's soul rules from a cavern of bone, learns and
judges through flesh-born windows. The heart is meat.
The head is where the Man is."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom

name: Dusk Tread
explicitMods: 9% chance to gain Onslaught for 4 seconds on Kill
12% increased Movement Speed if you haven't been Hit Recently
7% chance to gain Elusive on Critical Strike
7% increased Attack, Cast and Movement Speed while you have Onslaught
25% increased Effect of Tailwind on you
You have Tailwind if you have dealt a Critical Strike Recently

socketedItems.secDescrText: Grants a buff giving more poison damage and a chance to inflict poison. When you poison an enemy while you have this buff, you gain Virulence, and summon an Agony Crawler minion that uses projectile and area attacks. You will lose Virulence over time, at a rate which increases the more Virulence you have. The minion will die when you have no Virulence.
explicitMods: Buff grants 20% chance to Poison on Hit
Grants Virulence when you Poison an Enemy
Buff grants 10% more Damage with Poison
Agony Crawler has 4% increased Attack Speed per Virulence you have
Agony Crawler deals 9% increased Physical Damage per Virulence you have
Agony Crawler has 45 to 84 Added Physical Damage per Virulence you have
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Grants a buff which adds lightning damage to spells and attacks. If you kill a shocked enemy, this skill will create a storm, causing lightning bolts to strike enemies around you for a duration. The damage inflicted by this skill is not affected by modifiers to spell damage.
explicitMods: Storm Hits an Enemy every 0.25 Seconds
Storms Hit Enemies with 20% increased Frequency
Creates a storm when you Kill a Shocked Enemy
Buff grants 20 to 81 Added Attack Lightning Damage
Buff grants 20 to 81 Added Spell Lightning Damage
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText:
Supports any skill gem.
Cannot support skills that don't come from gems.
explicitMods: +2 to Level of Supported Skill Gems
+16% to Quality of Supported Skill Gems
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: "Although we are two bodies, we are of one mind, one heart, drifting
through the cosmos, in search of purpose. The moment we cross paths,
both fleeting and eternal, our eyes are opened to our potential."

flavourText: "True power grows with patience. You must nurture it.
You learn what it needs. You provide. You wait. Only
then, when it is ripe, does it yield its fruits."

socketedItems.secDescrText: This spell creates ethereal blades which orbit in an area around you, dealing damage every 0.6 seconds to all enemies in their radius. As more blades are added, the damage becomes greater and more frequent.
socketedItems.builtInSupport: Supported by Level 1 Increased Critical Damage
explicitMods: 40% increased Hit Rate for each blade
Can have up to 10 active spinning blades

flavourText: "She fled from the prison of her birth, drawn by the breaking
of that great Silence. At that moment, the universe was changed,
and walls that were once impenetrable became brittle.
A fortress became a shell, and she alone escaped."

flavourText: Immortality could grant Catarina the time necessary to shape
a better world... but building requires sacrifice, and the useless
would be crushed into the foundation of her new utopia.

explicitMods: Gain 17% of Physical Damage as Extra Fire Damage

name: The Gull
explicitMods: Trigger Level 1 Create Lesser Shrine when you Kill an Enemy
89% increased Effect of Shrine Buffs on you
61% increased Duration of Shrine Effects on you
flavourText: "It is the Gull that delivers Man unto Ancestor.
The consumer of our flesh. The seeder of our
souls unto the earth. We give the Gull his life.
The Gull gives us our Way."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom

flavourText: The Black Sekhema was a formidable fighter
alongside her dekhara, but she was unstoppable
when she fought atop her trusted mount, Shiyo.

name: Progenesis
explicitMods: When Hit during effect, 25% of Life loss from Damage taken occurs over 4 seconds instead
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: They were bred in a cosmic ocean of raw creation.
Feasting and drinking of the milk of the mother,
they fought to the death for every last drop.

name: The Golden Charlatan
enchantMods: Quality does not increase Physical Damage
Grants 1% increased Area of Effect per 4% Quality
explicitMods: Critical Strikes with this Weapon do not deal extra Damage
Gain a random Shrine Buff for 36.3 seconds when you Kill a Rare or Unique Enemy
flavourText: "He speaks, he leads, he stands tall...
yet, what has he truly done, save
spill our blood in pursuit of power?"

socketedItems.secDescrText: Grants a buff providing fire damage based on your physical damage. While you have this buff, if you kill an enemy, other enemies near them will be burned based on the overkill damage. The burn inflicted by this skill can only be affected by modifiers to damage over time (burning damage is damage over time).
explicitMods: Base Burning Damage is 30% of Overkill Damage
Buff grants 21% of your Physical Damage as Extra Fire Damage
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Grants a buff which lets you deal more physical damage. When you kill an enemy while you have this buff, this skill will summon a Sentinel of Purity, or refresh the duration and life of an existing one instead if you have the maximum number of them. The Sentinels of Purity have a single-target melee attack and an area melee attack.

a mote of flame, kindled by fury
